package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceTypeOutsideServicePackage() string {
    ruleID := "service_type_outside_service_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Concrete use-case services declared outside `service` or `services` packages in layered web-service repos."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
